<!-- Thanks for contributing to hark! Keep PRs focused; one logical change each. -->

## What & why

<!-- A short description of the change and the motivation. Link any issue:
     "Closes #123" -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / flag
- [ ] Docs only
- [ ] Refactor / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] `make build` passes
- [ ] `make test` passes
- [ ] Verified the change by **running the binary** (e.g. `hark --help`,
      `hark config show`), not just compiling
- [ ] Docs updated where relevant (`README.md`, `docs/reference.md`,
      `man/hark.1`) and `CHANGELOG.md` `Unreleased` entry added
- [ ] If a config key was added, all five sync points were updated
      (see [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md#gotchas-worth-knowing))

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything that needs context: tradeoffs, follow-ups, things you're unsure
     about, manual test steps. -->
